---
title: "Ensemble learning"
subtitle: "Bagging, random forests, boosting"
date: "Nov 6, 2026"
date-format: long
---

Why averaging helps; bagging and the bootstrap; random forests and feature subsampling; boosting (AdaBoost, gradient boosting) as a different ensemble philosophy.

📖 **Assigned reading:** ISLR §8.2

---

## 📊 Slides

- 🖥️ [Clean slides](slides_clean.pdf)
- ✏️ [Annotated slides](slides_annotated.pdf)  *(in-class version)*

## 📚 Readings

- 📄 [Phillips et al. (2023)](readings/Phillips et al. (2023).pdf)

## 🧪 Lab

In-class walkthrough — open the rendered lab in a new tab. The R Markdown source is provided so you can run the code yourself in RStudio.

- 🧪 [class11 lab1 (HTML)](code/class11_lab1.html){target="_blank"}
- 📝 [Lab source (class11_lab1.Rmd)](code/class11_lab1.Rmd)
